llm_values.evidence:
The root cause of the failure begins at Step 19, where the agent identifies lines 11 and 13 as the only name-related sections to update, completely missing line 25 ('name : "Your Sidebar Name"'), which is clearly visible in the text editor and essential for the user's profile. This is an Observation Omission (P4). 

The failure is compounded by a later error at Step 25, where the agent incorrectly claims to have updated line 11 when it had only updated line 13 (a Visual Hallucination/Progress Misjudgment, P1/R10), and at Step 32, where an incorrect selection at Step 30 led to the email being saved as 'Test@gmail.comg' instead of 'Test@gmail.com'. 

Since Step 19 is the earliest point where the agent failed to properly identify the scope of the task's required changes, it is the root error step.
llm_values.correction: At step 19, the agent should have identified all relevant name-related fields in the _config.yml file, including line 11 ('title'), line 13 ('name' anchor), and line 25 ('name' under author). Instead, it only identified lines 11 and 13, and subsequently failed to even update line 11 due to a hallucination and progress misjudgment at step 25. Furthermore, the agent should have ensured the email address was correctly selected and replaced in its entirety to avoid leaving trailing characters.
